name: 11-forseti-negative-tests
hypothesis: Realm setup for the 11-forseti-negative-tests Playwright test (the Forseti negative-path suite): 'executive' and 'procurementofficer' realm roles exist; the test-app admin holds both (drafter/committer + executive approver), two more executives (admin2, user3 — three executives total, enough to mint a real ciphertext via the 3-executive encrypt path) and two procurement officers (user4, user5) hold theirs; and a public test-app client is registered, so the contract's under-threshold / wrong-tag rejections can be exercised; the baseline token still ORK-signs.
_provides: realm roles 'executive' and 'procurementofficer'; the test-app admin holds both; admin2+user3 (executive) and user4+user5 (procurementofficer); a public 'testapp' client (origin http://localhost:3000). The Forseti policy + ciphertext the negatives operate on are created in-spec (self-contained — no longer a fixture handoff from spec 10). user3 is the 3rd executive needed to mint that ciphertext via the contract's 3-executive encrypt path.
